violations.text: Menu is lacking allergen advisory statement. Allergen advisory statement required to inform customers of their obligation to notify staff of any food allergies. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Establishment will use 3 bay sink to sanitize dishes. PIC to send inspector proof of correction. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
The kitchen hand-washing sink is adjacent to the food prep sink. A splash guard shall be installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023
The condensate line from the dispensing soda gun is draining into the handsink. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain in a proper manner. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2025
The floors in the walk-in cooler observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
Various floor tiles in the kitchen were observed cracked. The physical facilities to be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2026

The kitchen hand-washing sink is adjacent to the food prep sink. A splash guard shall be installed. -This violation did not exceed the original correction date of 05/11/23. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2023

The floors in the walk-in cooler observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. This violation has not exceed the original correction date of 08/15/23. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2023
